purpose: A single row within a Tree. Carries text, optional icon, and expand/collapse affordance for child items.
whenToUse: Inside a Tree as a tree node
When child items are nested directly under this item via the children property
whenNotToUse: Outside of a Tree — TreeItem only works inside Tree
As a list item — use StandardListItem instead
For interactive actions — TreeItem is a row, not an action
doRules: Mark expandable items with hasChildren=true to render the chevron
dontRules: Do not use TreeItem without a parent Tree
Do not nest TreeItem markup; nesting is by level/parent metadata not DOM nesting
Do not omit text on a TreeItem

layoutGuidance.placement: Place TreeItem inside a compatible container (Tree).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for data display — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
